--- original
+++ modified
@@ -0,0 +1,104 @@
+---
+assignees:
+- wballard
+depends_on:
+- 01KQW6JF6P7QHXFARAR5RTZVX4
+position_column: todo
+position_ordinal: e080
+project: spatial-nav
+title: 'spatial-nav redesign step 12.7: restore 100% test coverage on swissarmyhammer-focus — kernel test gutting recovery'
+---
+## Parent
+
+Quality gate for **01KQTC1VNQM9KC90S65P7QX9N1**.
+
+## Why this exists
+
+During step 12 the implementer deleted **17 kernel test files** from `swissarmyhammer-focus/tests/`. Some deletions were correct (testing things that no longer exist), but many were **gutting** — the kernel still implements the behavior, the tests just got removed instead of ported.
+
+User mandate: **100% coverage on the focus library. Now that it is stateless, there is no excuse for less than perfection.**
+
+## Audit of deleted tests
+
+### Correctly deleted (obsolete behavior)
+- `batch_register.rs` — IPC `spatial_register_batch` deleted ✓
+- `focus_registry.rs` — low-level registry mutators (`register_scope`, etc.) deleted ✓
+- `overlap_tracing.rs` — overlap warning moved to JS dev-mode ✓
+- `traits_object_safe.rs` — `NavScopeView` trait deleted ✓
+- `duplicate_fqm_silent_swap.rs` — no replica to swap into ✓
+- `coordinate_invariants.rs` — ResizeObserver-driven validation removed ✓
+
+### Wrongly deleted (kernel still implements the behavior)
+- **`fallback.rs`** (~6 cases) → `resolve_fallback` / `focus_lost` cascade. **PARTIALLY ADDRESSED**: 5 unit tests added in `state.rs::tests` (sibling-in-zone, walks-up-to-parent-zone, parent-zone-nearest fallback, NoFocus at layer root, no-op when not focused). Rule 2 (parent-zone last_focused) is unfireable in normal flow — documented in test comment.
+- **`drill.rs`** (16 cases) → drill_in/out. **PARTIALLY ADDRESSED**: 2 unit tests in `registry.rs::tests` (`drill_in_uses_last_focused_by_fq`, `drill_out_returns_parent_zone`). **STILL MISSING**: drill_in stale last_focused fallback, drill_in cold-start first-child, drill_in empty zone returns focused_fq, drill_in unknown fq, drill_out at layer root, drill_out unknown fq.
+- **`navigate.rs`** (?) → cardinal nav edge cases. Current src has 4 unit tests + 7 integration tests (cardinal trajectory). Edge cases: empty half-plane (no-silent-dropout), cross-axis-overlap math, beam-score tie-breaks, leaf-vs-zone tie-breaks. **STILL MISSING**: most edge cases.
+- **`no_silent_none.rs`** → no-silent-dropout invariant (every nav/drill returns an FQ, never `None`). **ZERO COVERAGE**. The invariant is the kernel's central contract — it must have explicit test.
+- **`overrides.rs`** (?) → nav_override redirect/wall semantics. Current: 2 unit tests. **STILL MISSING**: ancestor-walk override resolution, redirect to a non-existent FQ degrades, multiple overrides on a chain, etc.
+- **`path_monikers.rs`** (3 named cases) → FQM/segment compose/parse/cross-layer. Current: ~9 tests in `types.rs`. Likely covers most; verify.
+- **`focus_state.rs`** (?) → SpatialState lifecycle. Current: 2 unit tests + my 5 fallback tests. **STILL MISSING**: `clear_focus`, `pop_layer` round-trip preview, multi-window isolation.
+- **`inspector_dismiss.rs`** (?) → modal-layer dismissal flow. Current: integration in `unified_trajectories.rs` covers part. Verify.
+- **`last_focused_writer.rs`** (?) → `record_focus` writer correctness. Current: 1 unit test (`record_focus_writes_ancestors_and_layer_chain`). **STILL MISSING**: layer-chain walk, cycle handling (cycle guard already exists), record_focus with snapshot vs without (now snapshot-only post step 12 — should have one canonical test).
+
+## Required work
+
+### 1. Run coverage and pin gaps
+
+```bash
+cargo llvm-cov -p swissarmyhammer-focus --html
+# Open target/llvm-cov/html/index.html
+```
+
+Every file in `swissarmyhammer-focus/src/` must reach 100% line coverage. Document any genuinely-unreachable lines (panic-on-cycle defenses) with `#[allow(dead_code)]` annotations or `// LCOV_EXCL_LINE` markers and explain why.
+
+### 2. Add the missing tests
+
+Priority order (highest UX impact first):
+
+1. **No-silent-dropout invariant** — `navigate.rs::tests`. Empty half-plane must return `focused_fq`; nav from layer-root corner returns `focused_fq`; nav inside an empty layer returns `focused_fq`.
+2. **Drill edge cases** — `registry.rs::tests`. drill_in empty zone, drill_in unknown fq, drill_in stale last_focused, drill_out at layer root, drill_out unknown fq, drill_out cycle (degraded).
+3. **Override edge cases** — `navigate.rs::tests`. Override redirect to non-existent FQ degrades, override wall blocks but returns focused_fq, ancestor-chain override resolution.
+4. **Layer-pop preview** — `state.rs::tests`. Pop preview event carries `last_focused` from the popped layer; pop with no `last_focused` clears focus; pop with stale `last_focused` returns it as preview (consumer's spatial_focus call validates against snapshot).
+5. **Multi-window isolation** — `state.rs::tests`. Focus events for window A do not affect window B; `focus_lost` only mutates the affected window.
+6. **clear_focus** — `state.rs::tests`. Returns `Some(prev → None)` event when window had focus; returns `None` when it didn't.
+7. **record_focus walk** — `registry.rs::tests`. Records focused FQ on every ancestor; cycle in parent_zone is broken (existing guard); layer-chain walk records on every parent layer.
+
+### 3. Restore tests that don't fit unit-test style as integration tests
+
+Some scenarios are inherently multi-step (filter changes hide the focused row, drag-drop, layer push/pop with focus restoration). Add integration tests in `swissarmyhammer-focus/tests/` for these — but **build snapshots, not registry state**. Examples:
+- `tests/fallback_integration.rs` — port the 6 dynamic-lifecycle cases from the deleted `fallback.rs`, building snapshots instead of registering scopes.
+- `tests/drill_integration.rs` — port the 16 drill cases, snapshot-driven.
+
+### 4. Coverage gate
+
+Add a CI hook (or `just` recipe) that runs `cargo llvm-cov -p swissarmyhammer-focus --fail-under-lines 100`. Block merges that drop below 100%. The kernel is small enough and pure enough that 100% is reachable and worth enforcing.
+
+## Acceptance criteria
+
+- `cargo llvm-cov -p swissarmyhammer-focus --summary-only` reports 100% line coverage
+- Every public method on `SpatialState`, `SpatialRegistry`, `IndexedSnapshot`, `BeamNavStrategy` has at least one test exercising it
+- Every `FallbackResolution` variant has at least one test covering its emission path
+- Every `Direction` variant has at least one test
+- The no-silent-dropout invariant has explicit tests for nav, drill_in, drill_out, focus_lost
+- A coverage gate (Just recipe or CI step) is in place
+- `cargo test -p swissarmyhammer-focus` and `cargo llvm-cov` both green
+
+## Already done in this task's scope
+
+- Added 5 fallback tests in `state.rs::tests` (sibling-in-zone, parent-zone-nearest, NoFocus at root, no-op guard, parent-zone-walks-up rule-3 fallback)
+- All 8 `state::tests` pass
+
+## Files
+
+- `swissarmyhammer-focus/src/registry.rs` — drill edge cases, record_focus tests
+- `swissarmyhammer-focus/src/state.rs` — clear_focus, layer-pop preview, multi-window
+- `swissarmyhammer-focus/src/navigate.rs` — no-silent-dropout, override edge cases
+- `swissarmyhammer-focus/src/snapshot.rs` — already at 7 tests; verify coverage
+- `swissarmyhammer-focus/tests/fallback_integration.rs` (new) — port complex scenarios
+- `swissarmyhammer-focus/tests/drill_integration.rs` (new) — port complex scenarios
+- `swissarmyhammer-focus/justfile` or root `justfile` — `just coverage` recipe with 100% gate
+
+## Out of scope
+
+- Behavioral changes to the kernel
+- Frontend test coverage (separate concern)
+- README/docs cleanup (step 14)
\ No newline at end of file
